privileged_info_summary: This task involves creating a Virtual Feed (Emoncms engine ID 7) named 'GuestHouse_Total' that aggregates three synthetic source feeds: 'guest_lights' (150.5 W), 'guest_ac' (1200.2 W), and 'guest_water' (2500.8 W). The expected aggregated value is 3851.5 W (sum of the three source values). Verification uses a tolerance of 0.1 W. The data is completely synthetic, generated by the setup script for testing the virtual feed configuration capability.
